frag_pharma_nitrofurantoin_uti_001.content: Nitrofurantoin 100mg modified-release twice daily for 5 days is a first-line treatment for uncomplicated lower UTI in non-pregnant adults.

frag_pharma_allergy_cross_reactivity.content: Patients with penicillin allergy have <1% cross-reactivity with nitrofurantoin. Nitrofurantoin is considered safe for penicillin-allergic patients.

frag_pharma_trimethoprim_uti_002.content: Trimethoprim 200mg twice daily for 5 days is an alternative first-line treatment for uncomplicated lower UTI, but resistance rates vary by region.
